description: 10 claims hand-computed for every cash-waterfall step: 5 paid, 2 front-end denied (CARC 27), 2 clinical denied (CARC 50), 1 aged bad-debt row.

management_reported_revenue_for_qor_test.note: accrual formula = gross - contractual - (initial_denials - appeals) - bad_debt = 10000 - 2000 - 1600 - 600 = 5800; delta vs mgmt = +800 = +16% → CRITICAL
